Codici di huffman:
C: 1
F: 01
H: 001
D: 0001
N: 00001
B: 000001
U: 0000001
G: 00000001
Z: 00000000000000000000
M: 000000000001
I: 00000000000000000001
V: 0000000001
T: 0000000000000000001
R: 000000000000000001
E: 00000000001
S: 00000000000000001
L: 0000000000000001
Q: 000000000000001
O: 00000000000001
P: 0000000000001
A: 000000001

Decodifica della stringa 01111000110101: FCCCDCFF
